---
title: "Jessica Salley Riccardi"
pagetitle: "Jessica Salley Riccardi"
first-name: "Jessica Salley"
last-name: "Riccardi"
credentials: "PhD, CCC-SLP"
position: "✨ Associate Professor ✨"
affiliation: "University of Maine"
pronouns: "she/her"
orcid: "0000-0002-3102-3358"
date-joined: "2021-02-01"
order: 8
categories:
  - "Collaborator"
description-research: "Dr. Riccardi is interested in long-term outcomes after childhood brain injury, particularly in the area of cognitive-communication and in high-risk groups."
description-os: "Dr. Riccardi is passionate about getting research in clinicians' hands to change practice and improve outcomes for our clients."
link: "https://umaine.edu/bearlab/"
website-button: "Visit the BEaR Lab Website!"
headshot: "../_headshots/Jessica Riccardi.jpg"
lightbox: false
draft: false
layout: article
title-block-categories: false
editor: source
---

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![{{< meta title >}}, {{< meta credentials >}}<br>{{< meta position >}}<br>{{< meta affiliation >}}](../_headshots/Jessica Riccardi.jpg)
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
{{< meta description-research >}}

{{< meta description-os >}}

[{{< meta website-button>}}]({{< meta link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}\
\
:::
::::::
